pages.name: Home
pages.description: Landing page introducing the agency and providing quick access to key actions, featured talent, and highlighted events/workshops.
primary_functions: Present overview of model management and talent agency services.
Provide prominent calls-to-action to find talent, post a casting, join as talent, view events, and see pricing.
Show featured talent, campaigns, or upcoming workshops to guide users deeper into the site.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Submit quick 'Find Talent' search form in hero section.
Click primary CTA button 'Post a Casting'.
Click primary CTA button 'Join as Talent'.
Click 'View all workshops in your area' link near featured events.
Click 'View client plans' or 'Pricing' CTA.
Click on a featured talent card.
Click on a featured 'Intro to Modeling' or other workshop card.

access_methods.description: Direct URL entry or links from marketing campaigns.

pages.name: Talent Search
pages.description: Search and browse all models and actors with advanced filters and shortlist/favorites controls.
primary_functions: Filter talent by location (e.g., New York, Los Angeles, Miami), category (fashion model, fitness model, commercial actor), gender, age range, language, hourly rate, and rating.
Sort talent results (e.g., rating high to low, price low to high, most relevant).
Open individual talent profile pages for full details and booking options.
Add or remove talent from the shortlist and named favorite lists directly from search results.

incoming_params.description: Optional keyword query for searching talent by name or keywords.
Preselected location such as 'New York, NY' or 'Los Angeles, CA'.
Preselected primary talent category, e.g., 'Fashion Model', 'Fitness Model', 'Commercial Actor'.
Preselected gender filter, e.g., 'female' or 'male'.
Minimum age filter, e.g., 20.
Maximum age filter, e.g., 30.
Comma-separated list of languages that talent must all speak, e.g., 'English,Spanish'.
Comma-separated list of languages where any may match.
Minimum hourly rate filter.
Maximum hourly rate filter, e.g., 150.
Minimum average rating filter, e.g., 4.5.
Sort option key such as 'rating_desc', 'price_asc', 'price_desc', or 'relevance'.
Current page number for paginated results.
Number of results per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a talent card in the search results list.
Click 'View Shortlist' from search results header.
Use 'Message selected' bulk action to contact multiple filtered talents.
Click 'Create casting based on these filters'.

access_methods.description: Linked from homepage and other pages with prefilled filters via query parameters.

pages.name: Talent Profile
pages.description: Detailed page for an individual model or actor, including booking, availability, social metrics, shortlist, and messaging actions.
primary_functions: Display full talent information, including photos, bio, categories (e.g., fashion model, commercial actor), location, age, languages, rating, reviews, hourly rate, and social reach metrics (e.g., Instagram followers).
Show availability calendar and allow selection of specific dates to associate with shortlist entries or bookings.
Add or remove the talent to/from the user's shortlist or any named favorites list (e.g., 'Summer Campaign').
Submit booking requests by selecting date, duration (hours), and viewing total cost to confirm it fits within a budget (e.g., 4 hours under $600).
Initiate a message to the talent by opening the messaging composer with the talent pre-selected as recipient.

incoming_params.description: TalentProfile.id for the talent whose profile should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View shortlist' after adding talent for a specific date.
Click 'Message' / 'Contact' button on the talent profile.
Optional: If booking requires enabling a plan, redirect to checkout after starting a subscription session from an upsell module.
Click 'Find similar talent' on the profile page.

access_methods.description: Accessed via talent profile ID in query string (e.g., talent_profile.html?id=123).

pages.name: Favorites & Lists
pages.description: Manage the shortlist and custom favorites lists for campaigns and future bookings, including composition checks like 2 male and 2 female models aged 20–30 from Miami.
primary_functions: View the default shortlist containing saved talent, including key info such as hourly rate, rating, location, gender, and age.
Create, rename, and delete custom favorite lists (e.g., 'Summer Campaign').
Add, remove, or move talents between the shortlist and specific lists.
Open talent profiles from any list to compare details such as social reach or pricing.
Verify list composition meets campaign requirements (e.g., confirm a list contains 2 male and 2 female models aged 2030 in Miami).

incoming_params.description: Optional TalentList.id to open a specific list directly, such as the 'shortlist' or a named campaign list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a talent card within any list to view full details.
Click 'Find more like this' from a list header to expand the pool of similar talent.

access_methods.description: Accessible with active_list_id parameter to deep-link into a specific favorites list.

pages.name: Create Casting Call
pages.description: Single-page form to create and publish a casting call for models or actors, with role selection and visibility/deadline settings.
primary_functions: Select user role (e.g., client or casting director) before entering casting details.
Enter casting information including project title, location, talent type (e.g., fitness model), gender, number of talents needed, rate or budget, project date, and description.
Set visibility options and application deadlines for the casting call.
Publish the casting call and show an inline confirmation that it has been posted.

incoming_params.description: Default location for the casting, e.g., 'Los Angeles, CA'.
Suggested talent category for the casting, such as 'Fitness Model'.
Suggested gender filter for targeted casting, e.g., 'male'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Find talent for this casting' after publishing to browse matching profiles.
Click 'Invite shortlisted talent via message' from casting confirmation.

access_methods.description: CTAs from homepage or other pages to start a new casting.

pages.name: Talent Profile Setup
pages.description: Form for a new model or actor to create their talent profile and set availability, including name, contact, category, languages, and specific available dates.
primary_functions: Choose talent role/type (e.g., model, actor) and primary category such as fashion model.
Enter basic information including name, email, password, location, and experience level.
Specify spoken languages (e.g., English and Spanish) and any other profile details relevant to bookings.
Set availability by selecting specific dates on a calendar (e.g., marking November 12 and 13, 2026 as available).
Save and create the talent profile so it can appear in search and be available for casting and bookings.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View my public profile' after completing registration.
Click 'Explore workshops for new models' from the post-setup prompt.

access_methods.description: Linked from onboarding emails or campaigns inviting talent to join.

pages.name: Messages
pages.description: Messaging area to contact talent and manage conversations for castings, bookings, and general inquiries.
primary_functions: View inbox and sent messages related to castings, bookings, and general inquiries.
Compose new messages to one or more talents, including pre-filling recipients when accessed from a talent profile.
Send standardized inquiries (e.g., 'Casting for a bilingual commercial shoot in LA next month') to multiple recipients such as the first three filtered actors.
Continue existing message threads for follow-ups and clarifications.

incoming_params.description: Message folder to display, such as 'inbox' or 'sent'.
Comma-separated list of TalentProfile.id values to preselect as message recipients.
Optional subject line to prefill the message composer.
Optional message body template to prefill, such as a standard casting inquiry.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a talent's name/avatar within a message thread.
Click 'Create casting call from this conversation' in a client-talent thread.
Click 'View my shortlist' from the messaging sidebar.

access_methods.description: Access conversation view or composer with preselected recipients using URL parameters.

pages.name: Plans & Pricing
pages.description: Overview of subscription plans for talent scouting and other services, including comparison of Basic versus higher tiers and billing options.
primary_functions: Display all available subscription plans with pricing, including 'Basic' client/talent scouting plans.
Filter or view plans by plan type (e.g., client/talent scouting vs. talent plans) and billing frequency (monthly vs. annual).
Compare features and monthly prices across all Basic plans to identify the cheapest monthly option under $100.
Select a plan and proceed to the subscription checkout process.

incoming_params.description: Preselected plan type, e.g., 'talent_scouting' to focus on client scouting plans.
Optional plan tier to highlight, such as 'basic'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Choose Plan' on a plan card; after starting a checkout session, redirect to checkout with the returned checkoutId.

pages.name: Subscription Checkout
pages.description: Multi-step checkout page for confirming and reviewing a subscription plan, entering billing details, and reaching an order review summary.
primary_functions: Confirm the selected subscription plan and ensure the billing frequency is set to monthly.
Collect required account and billing information such as company name, contact email, and billing address.
Display the calculated monthly charge for the chosen plan before final confirmation.
Provide a final review step summarizing the selected plan and price so the user can verify details before submitting the subscription.

incoming_params.description: SubscriptionCheckoutSession.id created when the user selected a plan; used to load and update the in-progress checkout.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Change plan' from the checkout review step.

access_methods.description: Accessed with a valid checkoutId parameter after selecting a plan.
Reached after submitting plan selection on Plans & Pricing page and creating a checkout session.

pages.name: Events & Workshops
pages.description: Listing and search page for events, workshops, and training sessions with filters for location, type, and date range.
primary_functions: List upcoming events and workshops with basic details such as title, date, location, and type.
Filter events by location (e.g., New York, NY), event type (e.g., workshop), and date range (e.g., after August 1, 2026).
Search for specific events by title keywords (e.g., 'Intro to Modeling').
Open individual event detail pages for full information and registration.

incoming_params.description: Location filter for events, e.g., 'New York, NY'.
Type of event to filter by, such as 'workshop'.
Keyword to search event titles, e.g., 'Intro to Modeling'.
Start date (inclusive) for showing events, such as '2026-08-02' for after August 1, 2026.
Optional end date for limiting events results.
Sort option for events, e.g., 'date_asc'.
Current page of event results.
Number of events to show per page.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event card in the events list.
Click 'Find local talent' on an event tile for that city.

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detailed page for a single event or workshop, including full description, schedule, and registration with pay-on-site or other payment options.
primary_functions: Show complete event details such as title, description, date and time, location, capacity, and pricing.
Allow users to register by selecting the number of seats or tickets (e.g., 2 seats).
Offer payment options including pay-on-site / pay-at-event where applicable.
Submit the event registration and display an on-page confirmation for the reserved seats.

incoming_params.description: Event.id of the event/workshop to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to all events in this city'.
Click 'Find talent attending similar workshops' or similar CTA.

access_methods.description: Accessed via event ID parameter (e.g., event_detail.html?id=456).

pages.name: About
pages.description: Background information about the model management and talent agency, including mission, values, and specializations.
primary_functions: Explain the agencys mission, values, and areas of specialization (e.g., fashion, commercial, fitness).
Describe the benefits for clients and talent using the platform.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Contact us' from the About page.
Click 'Join as Talent' CTA within About content.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Page for getting in touch with the agency via email, phone, office locations, or a contact form.
primary_functions: Provide contact details such as email addresses, phone numbers, and office locations.
Offer a contact form for general inquiries, support, or business questions.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Visit Help & FAQ' from contact support suggestions.

access_methods.description: Linked from external sites or emails for direct support.

pages.name: Help & FAQ
pages.description: Support and frequently asked questions about using the website for clients and talent.
primary_functions: Answer common questions about finding talent, posting castings, booking, subscriptions, and events.
Provide guidance and tips for talent on setting up profiles and availability.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Still need help? Contact us' from the FAQ page.

pages.name: Terms & Conditions
pages.description: Legal terms governing use of the site and services, including bookings, subscriptions, and event participation.
primary_functions: Detail the terms of service related to castings, bookings, subscriptions, and event participation.
Outline user responsibilities and acceptable use policies for the platform.

pages.name: Privacy Policy
pages.description: Information on how user data is collected, used, and protected across profiles, bookings, messages, and analytics.
primary_functions: Describe data collection practices for profiles, bookings, castings, messages, and subscriptions.
Explain how cookies, tracking, and data sharing are handled to comply with privacy regulations.

header_links.description: Homepage with overview and main calls-to-action
Search and filter models and actors
Create and publish a new casting call
View and manage shortlist and custom favorites lists
View inbox and send messages to talent
Browse and filter events and workshops
Create a new model or actor talent profile

footer_links.description: Support resources and frequently asked questions
Link to events and workshops listing
Legal terms for using the site
Information on data privacy and cookies
